disputes: Hole count: course has 29 physical holes but is marketed as 27-hole playable (2 holes closed daily for maintenance). Published as 27 holes to match what golfers actually play.
data_notes: Green fee range 2,000–2,500 THB from 1golf.eu and golflux; using weekday 2,000, weekend 2,500.
Cart fee 600 THB confirmed (golfsavers). Cart not listed as mandatory — defaulting to cart_required: false per standard.
Caddie 300 THB confirmed, caddie required per all booking sources.
Phone +66-53-910000 from official site and multiple booking platforms.
GPS coordinates approximate for Wiang Chai / Mueang Chum area ~30 km east of Chiang Rai city.
Course described as Korean-owned, opened 2012, three nines: Mountain Breeze, Lakeside, River.
